message:
fix(engine): third pass replacing nightly-only is_multiple_of and hardening error paths

Concurrent agents continue to introduce uses of the nightly-only
u64::is_multiple_of() / usize::is_multiple_of() methods. This third
sweep covers 15 more files that gained these calls since the previous
two commits:

- benchmark_evidence_bundle: median parity check
- capability_witness: checkpoint interval modulo
- golden_vectors: hex string length validation
- seqlock_fastpath: sequence number parity (write-lock detection)
- succinct_witness_compiler: Merkle proof sibling index
- replacement_lineage_log, incident_replay_bundle: serialization expect
- And 8 more modules with the same pattern

All replacements use the stable `% N == 0` / `% N != 0` idiom.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
